content.headline: Enterprise Leadership: Justify Your Investment with Confidence
content.body:
CFOs need more than promises—they need evidence. Our enterprise solution provides:

[CLM_032] demonstrates how action ranking should consider expected ROI and feasibility to avoid initiative overload.

[CLM_046] shows how governed claims with citations increase trust and reduce legal risk in B2B messaging.

Every recommendation comes with auditable evidence and clear ROI projections. Perfect for board presentations.
